name: StudyFreaks
desc: A premium education platform for students in Hailakandi, Assam. Features specialized prep modules for CBSE, ASSEB, and JNVST entrance exams with a focus on high-speed performance.

name: Enlight Coaching
desc: Quality education for Classes 6 to 10 with focus on conceptual clarity, disciplined learning, and academic excellence. Join Enlight Coaching Centre today.

name: Mariam Juice Cafe
desc:
Mariam Juice Cafe (MJC) – Website
Developed a modern, responsive website for Mariam Juice Cafe to showcase their menu and improve their online presence. The site features a dynamic menu connected to a Supabase database with an admin panel for easy updates. Built with a focus on speed, simplicity, and mobile-friendly design.
